title: Senate (disambiguation)
content:
'''Senate''' may refer to the following articles:

{{IncompleteList|oou="oou"}}

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Galactic Senate]]''' of the [[Galactic Republic]]
*The '''[[Separatist Senate]]''' of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
*The '''[[Lothal Senate]]'''
*The Republic Senate's successor, the '''[[Imperial Senate]]'''
*The '''[[New Republic Senate]]'''

==Legends==
*The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], later renamed the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]], was the most famous, powerful, and long-lasting senate in the galaxy. It existed for 25,000 years, from the establishment of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to its dissolution under [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
*Its successor was the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].
*The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] also established its own [[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senate]]
*[[Separatist Senate/Legends|Separatist Senate]], also known as the Separatist Parliament or the Separatist Congress
*The [[Bakuran Senate]] ruled the planet [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].
*[[Ylesian Senate]]
*[[Rhommamoolian Senate]]
*[[Chiss Senate]]
*[[Senate Guard Academy]]
*[[Tapani Senate]]

In addition, there are also the positions of [[President of the Senate]] and [[Vice Chair/Legends|Speaker of the Senate]].

{{Disambig}}
